Class-Cleric 20 — Male Human Cleric: 20
Strength: 18 (+4) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 16 (+3) Intelligence: 8 (-1) Wisdom: 18 (+4) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 2; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 689118/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 270/540
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength): Ability Boost (Strength)
Ability Boosts: 5 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Cleric (Blessed Strikes); Cleric (Cleric Subclass); Cleric (Divine Order)
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Alert; Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength); Magic Initiate (Druid); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Savage Attacker; Skilled Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Cleric Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Shield); Avatar Of Battle; Blessed Healer; Blessed Strikes; Blessing Of The Trickster; Channel Divinity; Cleric Subclass; Corona Of Light; Disciple Of Life; Divine Intervention; Divine Order; Divine Spark; Divine Strike; Epic Boon; Greater Divine Intervention; Guided Strike; Improved Blessed Strikes; Improved Duplicity; Improved Warding Flare; Invoke Duplicity; Life Domain Spells; Life Domain; Light Domain Spells; Light Domain; Potent Spellcasting; Preserve Life; Protector; Radiance Of The Dawn; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Sear Undead; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from History, Insight, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Spellcasting; Supreme Healing; Thaumaturge; Trickery Domain Spells; Trickery Domain; Trickster's Transposition; Turn Undead; War Domain Spells; War Domain; War God's Blessing; War Priest; Warding Flare; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Blessed Strikes: 1 selection
Cleric Subclass: 1 selection
Divine Order: 1 selection
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +10 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) +4 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +1
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) -1 Religion: (int) +9
Athletics: (str) +10 Medicine: (wis) +10 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +7 Nature: (int) +5 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +5 Perception: (wis) +10 Survival: (wis) +4
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; Deception; History; Insight; Medicine; Nature; Perception; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Languages: Common; Giant; Undercommon
Skill Notes:
Skilled: Skill Proficiency or Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thaumaturge: +4 Arcana/+4 Religion
Combat
Hit Points: 121 Initiative: +7 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Club (+10 1d4+4 B; Slow); Dagger (+10 1d4+4 P R20/60; Nick); Sickle (+10 1d4+4 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+10 1+4 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Improved Blessed Strikes: Has increased Divine Strike effects
Improved Warding Flare: Has increased Warding Flare effects
Protector: Armor Training (Heavy)/Weapon Proficiency (Martial Weapons)
Strength Attack Adjustment: +4
Strength Damage Adjustment: +4
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Strength): Bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage ignores resistance, and natural 20 hits inflict +18 damage
Divine Spark: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 4d8 hit points or to inflict 4d8 HP of a choice of necrotic or radiant (save Constitution half)
Divine Strike: Weapon inflicts +2d8 HP of a choice of necrotic or radiant once per turn
Guided Strike: Can use Channel Divinity after a failed attack to add +10 to the roll, or as a reaction to add +10 to a failed attack roll of an ally within 30'
Improved Duplicity: Self and allies have advantage on attacks vs. a foe within 5' of the Invoke Duplicity duplicate, and a target adjacent to the duplicate regains 20 hit points when the effect ends
Invoke Duplicity: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to create an illusionary duplicate for concentration up to 1 min, gaining the ability to use it for remote spellcasting and advantage on attacks when self and the duplicate are each adjacent to the target; can use a bonus action each rd to move the duplicate up to 30', to a maximum of 120' away
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sear Undead: Successful Turn Undead also inflicts 4d8 HP radiant
Trickster's Transposition: Can swap places with an Invoke Duplicity duplicate when creating or moving it
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 18 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
War Priest: Can use a bonus action to make an extra weapon attack or unarmed strike 4 times per short rest
Warding Flare: R30' Can use a reaction to inflict disadvantage on a foe attack and give the attack target 2d6+4 temporary hit points 4 times per short rest
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +7; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: -1; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +10
Save Notes: Avatar Of Battle: Has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: C0: 5; C: 22 Spell Slots: C1: 4; C2: 3; C3: 3; C4: 3; C5: 3; C6: 2; C7: 2; C8: 1; C9: 1 Attack: C: +10; D: +10; W: +5 Spell DC: C: 18; D: 18; W: 13
Spells:
Aid (C2 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 hit points]
Antimagic Field (C8 Abju): 10' radius suppresses magic for concentration up to 1 hr
Arcane Eye (C4 [Light Domain Spells] Divi): R30' Self sees with Darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Aura Of Life (C4 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): 30' radius gives allies resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Banishment (C4 Abju): R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min [+Level affects +1 target]
Bless (C1 [Life Domain Spells] Ench): R30' 3 targets gain +1d4 on attacks and saves for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blindness/Deafness (C2 Necr): 1
Burning Hands (C1 [Light Domain Spells] Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Charm Person (C1 [Trickery Domain Spells] Ench): R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Confusion (C4 [Trickery Domain Spells] Ench): R90' Creatures in a 10' radius lose reactions and bonus actions and randomly: 10% wander; 50% do nothing; 20% attack an adjacent creature; 20% act normally (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level increases the radius by 5']
Contagion (C5 Necr): Touch inflicts 11d8 HP necrotic, poisoned, and disadvantage on chosen ability saves (save Constitution negates; subsequent saves each turn either end after three successes or extend to 7 days after 3 failures; other effects that would end poisoned require a successful Constitution save to succeed)
Crusader's Mantle (C3 [War Domain Spells] Evoc): Ally attacks in 30' radius inflict +1d4 HP radiant for concentration up to 1 min
Cure Wounds (C1 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched regains 2d8+4 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Daylight (C3 [Light Domain Spells] Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Death Ward (C4 Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Death Ward (C4 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Dimension Door (C4 [Trickery Domain Spells] Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (C1 [Trickery Domain Spells] Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Dispel Magic (C3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Divination (C4 Divi): Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divine Word (C7 Evoc): R30' Inflicts death on targets with up to 20 HP, blinded, deafened, and stunned for 1 hr on those with up to 30 HP, blinded and deafened for 10 min on those with up to 40 HP, and deafened for 1 min on those with up to 50 HP, and forces celestials, elementals, fey, and fiends to return to their home planes (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr
Dominate Person (C5 [Trickery Domain Spells] Ench): R60' Target humanoid obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the duration to 10 min, 1 hr, or 8 hr at level 6, 7, or 8]
Enhance Ability (C2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Faerie Fire (C1 [Light Domain Spells] Evoc): R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Fire Shield (C4 [War Domain Spells] Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Storm (C7 Evoc): R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Fireball (C3 [Light Domain Spells] Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flame Strike (C5 [Light Domain Spells] Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 5d6 HP fire and 5d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP fire and radiant]
Freedom Of Movement (C4 [War Domain Spells] Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gate (C9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Greater Restoration (C5 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Guidance (C0 Divi): Touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Guiding Bolt (C1 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target before the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Guiding Bolt (C1 [War Domain Spells] Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target before the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Hallow (C5 Evoc): 60' radius becomes warded against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect
Heroes' Feast (C6 Conj): 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to becoming poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Hold Monster (C5 [War Domain Spells] Ench): R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hold Person (C2 Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hypnotic Pattern (C3 [Trickery Domain Spells] Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Inflict Wounds (C1 Necr): Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Insect Plague (C5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Invisibility (C2 [Trickery Domain Spells] Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Lesser Restoration (C2 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Magic Weapon (C2 [War Domain Spells] Tran): Touched weapon gains a +1 magic bonus for 1 hr [+Level gives a +2 or +3 bonus at level 3 or 6]
Mass Cure Wounds (C5 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+4 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Mass Healing Word (C3 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R60' 6 targets regain 2d4+4 HP [+Level restores +1d4 HP]
Mending (C0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Modify Memory (C5 [Trickery Domain Spells] Ench): R30' Incapacitates the target for concentration up to 1 min and allows changing the target's memory of a 10-min event from the past 24 hr (save Wisdom negates; a target in battle has advantage); damaging or additional casting on the target ends the spell [+Level changes the memory of an event from the past 7, 30, 365, or unlimited days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Nondetection (C3 [Trickery Domain Spells] Abju): Willing touched or touched 10'-long object gains immunity to divination for 8 hr
Pass Without Trace (C2 [Trickery Domain Spells] Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Remove Curse (C3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Revivify (C3 [Life Domain Spells] Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Sacred Flame (C0 Evoc): R60' Inflicts 4d8 HP radiant (save Dexterity negates), ignoring 1/2 and 3/4 cover
Sanctuary (C1 Abju): R30' Foes of the target cannot attack it (save Wisdom negates) for 1 min; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends
Scorching Ray (C2 [Light Domain Spells] Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
Scrying (C5 [Light Domain Spells] Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
See Invisibility (C2 [Light Domain Spells] Divi): Reveals invisible and ethereal creatures and objects for 1 hr
Shield Of Faith (C1 Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Shield Of Faith (C1 [War Domain Spells] Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Spare The Dying (C0 Necr): R120' Target dying creature becomes stable
Speak With Dead (C3 Necr): R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Spirit Guardians (C3 [War Domain Spells] Conj): 15' radius inflicts 3d8 HP necrotic or radiant (save Wisdom half) and half Speed on non-designated creatures for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Spiritual Weapon (C2 [War Domain Spells] Evoc): R60' Creates a spectral weapon that inflicts 1d8+4 HP force and can move 20' and attack as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Steel Wind Strike (C5 [War Domain Spells] Conj): R30' Inflicts 6d10 HP force on each of 5 targets and teleports self to a spot adjacent to one of them
Thaumaturgy (C0 Tran): R30' Creates a minor magic effect: a booming voice for 1 min; a modification of flames for 1 min; harmless ground tremors for 1 min; an illusory sound; movement of a door or window; a change in eye appearance for 1 min
True Seeing (C6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
Wall Of Fire (C4 [Light Domain Spells] Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wish (C9 [Greater Divine Intervention] Conj): Mimics an 8th level spell or alters reality with few limits; casting to alter reality reduces Strength to 3 for 2d4 days and causes later spellcasting before a long rest to inflict 1d10 HP necrotic per spell level
Magic Notes:
Improved Blessed Strikes: Has increased Potent Spellcasting effects
Thaumaturge: Knows +1 Cleric cantrip
Blessed Healer: Using a spell slot to cast a healing spell restores 2 + spell level hit points to self
Blessing Of The Trickster: R30' Target gains advantage on Stealth until next long rest or until given to another target
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 4 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Corona Of Light: Can use an action to emit a 60' bright light that inflicts foe disadvantage on saves vs. Radiance Of The Dawn and fire and radiant spells for 1 min 4 times per long rest
Disciple Of Life: Using a spell slot to cast a healing spell restores an additional 2 + spell level hit points
Divine Intervention: Can cast a level 5 Cleric spell without using a spell slot or material components once per long rest
Greater Divine Intervention: Can use Divine Intervention to cast Wish; requires 2d4 long rests before using Divine Intervention again
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Potent Spellcasting: Cleric cantrips inflict +4 HP and give 8 temporary hit points to a target within 60'
Preserve Life: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 100 hit points among targets, raising each to up to half its hit point maximum
Radiance Of The Dawn: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to dispel magical darkness and to inflict 2d10+20 HP radiant (save Constitution half) on targets
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the cleric spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Supreme Healing: Healing spells restore the maximum possible hit points
War God's Blessing: Can use Channel Divinity to cast Shield Of Faith or Spiritual Weapon, lasting 1 min, without expending a spell slot
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 3 available vs. 8 allocated
